---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for VeilLend
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions you've thought of.

## Component

Which part of VeilLend does this affect?

- [ ] `/veilend-soroban` (Stellar contracts)
- [ ] `/veilend-backend` (NestJS API)
- [ ] `/veilend-web` (Next.js frontend)
- [ ] `/veilend-mobile` (React Native app)
- [ ] Cross-cutting

## Additional Context

Add any other context or mockups here.
